description_long: This machine gun features a blocky, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by red and gray elements. The barrel is long and cylindrical, colored in red, and extends prominently from the front, while the stock is a simple, straight black extension at the rear. The magazine is a rectangular, gray component inserted vertically beneath the receiver, and a brownish grip is visible behind the magazine. The top of the receiver has a series of white rectangular markings, possibly representing a rail or venting slots. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined, and the overall construction suggests a modern, utilitarian firearm. The materials appear to be a mix of metal and polymer, with a matte finish and minimal surface detailing.
description: A blocky, modern machine gun with a red barrel, black body, gray magazine, and simple black stock. It features angular lines, white accents, and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The machine gun is seen from the front, highlighting the circular muzzle, red barrel, and the alignment of the stock and magazine behind it.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the red barrel, the rectangular gray magazine, the black stock, and the white markings on the receiver.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the end of the stock, the back of the receiver, and the alignment of the barrel and magazine from behind.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the same key features as view 1, with the brown grip and trigger more visible, and the red barrel extending forward.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with no visible cooling features
attribute_stock_design: straight fixed stock, likely polymer or plastic, with a simple rectangular profile
